{{Infobox
|image_url=https://raw.githubusercontent.com/PixelGuys/Cubyz/refs/tags/0.2.0/assets/cubyz/items/textures/candy_cane.png
|block_health=4
|tool=[[Axe]]
|rotation=branch
|durability=260
|mass_damage=1.5
|hardness_damage=0.5
|swing_speed=4.2
|tags=N/A
|modifiers=N/A
}}

== Obtaining ==
Candy Cane are only found in the Tuften Fields and Winter Wonderland rare biomes. They also can be crafted from [[Candy Cane Block|candy cane blocks]].

== Usage ==
Candy Cane can be used as a tool material.

== History ==

* [[0.1.0]] - Added to the game

== Trivia ==
{{Stub|section}}

[[Category:Blocks]]
